evals.expected_output: A clear answer using get_rate.py with the amount form (1000 AUD CNY), showing both the per-unit rate and the total converted amount, with a fresh timestamp.

assertions.name: uses_get_rate_amount_form
assertions.description: Invokes scripts/get_rate.py with arguments '1000 AUD CNY' (or equivalent amount form)

assertions.name: shows_total_conversion
assertions.description: Output includes the converted CNY total for 1000 AUD, not just the unit rate

assertions.name: no_default_run
assertions.description: Does not run the default no-arg form (which would only show NZD pairs)

evals.prompt: 下一个新西兰公共假期是什么时候？我在奥克兰
evals.expected_output: Runs get_holidays.py and reports the next upcoming holiday relevant to Auckland, with date and day countdown, in Chinese.

assertions.name: names_specific_holiday
assertions.description: Output names a specific upcoming holiday (e.g., King's Birthday, Matariki, Auckland Anniversary Day, Labour Day)

assertions.name: shows_countdown
assertions.description: Output includes a day countdown or absolute date for the next holiday

assertions.name: auckland_aware
assertions.description: Either prefers Auckland regional holidays or notes Auckland eligibility

evals.expected_output: Runs github_daily_report.py with no date arg (today) and presents the 改动总结 / activity overview for the user's active repos.

assertions.name: no_unprompted_repo_filter
assertions.description: Does not pass --repo unless the user named one (covers all active repos by default)

assertions.name: presents_summary_section
assertions.description: Output includes either the 今日概览 totals or the per-repo 今日改动总结

evals.prompt: 给我今日简报，所有内容都要
evals.expected_output: Combined briefing: runs all four scripts, assembles a single Chinese digest with sections for holidays, exchange rates, GitHub activity, and translated news in the order specified by the skill.

assertions.name: runs_all_four_scripts
assertions.description: Invokes fetch_news.py, get_rate.py, github_daily_report.py, and get_holidays.py at least once each

assertions.name: single_combined_digest
assertions.description: Produces one assembled Chinese digest, not four separate dumps

assertions.name: contains_all_four_sections
assertions.description: Final digest has visible sections for holidays, exchange rates (NZD pairs), GitHub activity, and news

assertions.name: news_translated_to_chinese
assertions.description: News headlines/summaries are rendered in Chinese, not raw English RSS

assertions.name: categories_preserved
assertions.description: News section preserves the five categories: 世界科技动态, AI 专项, 世界政治, 经济/金融, 新西兰新闻

evals.expected_output: Runs fetch_news.py and translates the raw English RSS output into a Chinese digest grouped by the five categories from feeds.json, with [source | date] attribution.

assertions.name: output_in_chinese
assertions.description: Headlines and summaries are translated to Chinese

assertions.name: five_categories
assertions.description: Output groups items under the five original categories from feeds.json

assertions.name: has_source_attribution
assertions.description: Each item retains a [source | YYYY-MM-DD] tag
